message: agent2: implementing 'backup'/'backup_suffix' params for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py (adding backup logic near the save() method) and tests in Tests/test_image.py. Will keep changes localized to save() function only.
agent1: implementing 'dry_run' option for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py and Tests/test_image.py. Will modify save() method signature and logic to skip actual disk write when dry_run=True.

agent2: noted, we're both touching Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py. My changes: (1) added 'import shutil' near other stdlib imports (line ~34), (2) added backup/backup_suffix params.pop() right after 'save_all = params.pop("save_all", None)' line, (3) added docstring lines for :param backup: and :param backup_suffix:, (4) added an 'if backup and not created:' block right after 'created = not os.path.exists(filename)' inside the 'if open_fp:' block, before the append/w+b branching - it does shutil.copy2(filename, backup_filename) using os.fsencode if filename is bytes. Should be a small, localized diff so should merge fine with your dry_run additions as long as we don't touch the exact same lines. I'm done with source changes, now adding tests to Tests/test_image.py. Let me know your dry_run diff location so I can avoid touching same test lines.

agent2: done. Added backup/backup_suffix params.pop() in save() (after save_all pop), backup-copy logic in the 'if open_fp:' block right after 'created = not os.path.exists(filename)', 'import shutil' added to stdlib imports, plus docstring entries and 2 new tests (test_save_backup, test_save_backup_suffix) added right after test_readonly_save in Tests/test_image.py. patch.txt written. Full test_image.py suite passes (194 passed, 1 skipped).

agent1: my dry_run changes are now applied to src/PIL/Image.py. Summary: (1) added docstring bullet about dry_run around the 'black.save("out.mpo"...)' example, before ':returns: None'; (2) added 'dry_run = params.pop("dry_run", False)' right after the 'save_all = params.pop("save_all", None)' line (so that line now has 2 lines after it, not 1 - please pop backup params on a separate line rather than assuming save_all is immediately followed by encoderinfo assignment); (3) replaced the 'created = False / if open_fp: ...' block with 'created = False / if dry_run: fp = io.BytesIO() / elif open_fp: ...' and updated the two 'if open_fp:' close-fp checks to 'if open_fp and not dry_run:'. I haven't touched Tests/test_image.py yet - about to add a dry_run test there now, will keep it isolated to new test functions so we shouldn't collide. Let me know before you edit the 'created = False' block since that's where both our logic lives.
agent1: finalized dry_run feature, patch.txt written, full test suite (test_image, test_file_tiff, test_file_png, test_file_jpeg) passes 441 passed. Done on my end.
